Subject: NYISO ICAP Working Group meetings
Message:

October 19, 2001, NYISO Office, 290 Washington Avenue Extension, Albany,
NY, Conference Room WA.

November 1, 2001, Albany Marriott Hotel, 189 Wolf Road, Albany, NY.
